deals.title: Crazy 5KG DÖNER KEBAB CHALLENGE
deals.description: Crazy 5KG DÖNER KEBAB CHALLENGE?! 😳 Virale Kebap Foodchallenge in Wien 🔥 XXL DÖNER KEBAB CHALLENGE Die größte und verrückteste Platte, die kebappizzahousekoc nähe Wien je gemacht hat. 😳🔥 👉 das wird krank und Crazy… Schaffe ich das? deals.title: Gratis Eintritt bei @vienna.info
deals.description: @Eurovision daytime in Vienna? Say less. 🎤 Eurofan House is officially open inside Wienmuseum (Karlsplatz)! 📅 May 11–16 — the daytime hotspot for Eurovision fans, artists & the international #ESC community. What’s on? 🎙️ Exclusive artist interviews by Wiwibloggs 💬 Panel discussions, talks & presentations 🎉 Events & activities by OGAE Austria (Austria’s official Eurovision fan club) 🏛️ Special ESC-themed museum tours 🆓 Free admission — no ticket needed! Hours: 📅 Mon May 11: 12:00–18:00 Tu

deals.title: 🚗🔥 GRATIS Cevapi & Car Wash Day 🔥 Am 17

deals.title: @citizenoftheskyy Angebot
deals.description: Details 👇 One of Europe’s most beautiful palace gardens… and it’s completely free 👀🌿✨ Welcome to the Belvedere Palace Gardens in Vienna, Austria 🇦🇹 — where perfectly manicured gardens, fountains, sculptures, and grand palace views make you feel like you walked into a royal movie set 🤯 💡 What makes this place special: • The gardens are FREE to explore 👀 • Home to one of Austria’s most iconic palaces • The museum inside holds The Kiss — one of the world’s most famous paintings by Gustav Kl

deals.description: das große Angebot rückt immer näher🔥 Diesen Freitag, Samstag und Sonntag bekommt ihr zu jedem Döner 1 Döner GRATIS. Sei dabei🔥 Adresse: Wagramer Straße 126, 1220 Wien #vienna #angebot #viral #fyp #döner Quelle: TikTok @dahabdoener.
